description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use two macos-latest jobs: one for testing and one for packaging a dmg. The test job checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt 5.15.2, sets up dependencies, builds, and tests. The package-dmg job depends on the test job, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt 5.15.2, sets up dependencies, builds, packages a dmg, and uploads it.
